---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: dellipse
---

## What would you like to see?

A clear, concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Why is it useful?

Who benefits and in what situation?

## Rough approach (optional)

Any thoughts on how it could be implemented — or if it touches specific areas (search, AI, kits, MCP, mobile UI, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

Is there a workaround today, or a different way to solve the same problem?
